bodyHtml:
Active research-project theses

Scope: sentiment-analyst (slice: own + notes you contributed to) Active: 2 · Recently closed (last 14d): 0

These are analyst-owned long-running research threads. Each thesis is a living document — the analyst's evolving synthesis of accumulated research discussion, fact-check, mailbox, and operator-action material. Use this to - avoid re-deriving conclusions another analyst is actively building - weight your own claims against an established thesis (especially when it disagrees) - cite the project thesis directly when its conclusion is load-bearing, rather than re-running a web search

KB 刷新追踪: 化工

Owner: energy-analyst · Thesis v10 · Ticks: 5 · Materials: 24 · Deadline: 6d left · project_id: rp_33b783444cfe43a2

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 化工 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.795, 1 live facts, 10d stale, 14 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 化工's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 化工

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 化工 is stale/weak/contested (need=0.795, 1 live facts, 10d stale, 14 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 化工's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

本轮刷新维持化工Underweight：价格同比走高更像能源/原料成本推动的名义价格信号，不足以证明价差扩张，因此chemical_input_cost_risk、price_growth_trend与chemical_rating可调和为“成本脆弱、价格有支撑、利润率仍受压”同一链条evidence refevidence refevidence ref。能源价格向化工0.65-0.85的高传导弹性仍是核心约束，AI电力侧BTM天然气只把气价、LNG、许可和碳成本重新定价，不构成化工beta上修证据evidence refevidence ref。配置含义是继续低配大宗化工、只在能证明成本转嫁与价差扩张的子行业做选择性筛选；该判断与th_p_784bff49的黄偏防御、轻股票久期一致[thesis:th_p_784bff49]。

2. 关键证据

  • 化工能源传导弹性0.65-0.85，价差先受压evidence ref
  • 投入成本仍是能源链真实脆弱点evidence ref
  • 价格同比增长可为成本推动，非毛利扩张evidence ref

KB 刷新追踪: 必选消费

Owner: chief-strategist · Thesis v18 · Ticks: 9 · Materials: 172 · Deadline: 3d left · project_id: rp_e9ec3e2aa36c4340

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 必选消费 is stale/weak/contested (need=1.027, 2 live facts, 23d stale, 24 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 必选消费's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

KB 刷新追踪: 必选消费

Kickoff: Auto-seeded from KB-need: the institute's knowledge of 必选消费 is stale/weak/contested (need=1.027, 2 live facts, 23d stale, 24 mentions, open conflict). Re-research to refresh the chain facts.

Resolution criterion (the stop condition): Resolved when 必选消费's chain facts are refreshed (re-verified within the last 14 days) and any open contradiction is reconciled.

1. 当前判断

截至2026-07-22，必选消费25%配置目标仍成立，但应从“整篮子防御超配”降维为“低Beta/高股息底仓 + 即时零售/B端链主 + 传统拥挤腿限额”evidence ref[thesis:th_p_d4253438]。开放冲突已可调和：结构性拥挤集中在白酒、传统防御叙事与红利尾部，而食品板块融资偿还和低Beta筛选说明精选底仓未形成全板块拥挤[thesis:th_T13]evidence ref。白酒再入场仍需批价连续两周站稳1600、库存下降、应收改善三条件同现；在此之前，增量应继续给即时零售、B端供应链链主和分红覆盖更稳的基础食品[thesis:th_T13]。

2. 关键证据

  • 必选消费配置目标25%，但传统腿有结构性拥挤瓶颈evidence ref
  • 食品板块融资偿还，低Beta高股息龙头未见全板块拥挤[thesis:th_p_d4253438]
  • 618全网GMV仅+4.0%，即时零售+112.3%贡献92.5%增量[thesis:th_T13]
  • 山西汾酒2026Q1营收-9.68%、净利-19.03%，白酒弱势未修复[thesis:th_T13]
  • A股配置宜“AI可验证成长 + 高股息消费防御”哑铃evidence ref
  • 电子/通信单核吸金未破，消费防御不宜扩成广义复苏交易evidence ref

3.
